title: Construction and Building Inspectors
description: Inspect structures using engineering skills to determine structural soundness and compliance with specifications, building codes, and other regulations. Inspections may be general in nature or may be limited to a specific area, such as electrical systems or plumbing.

tasks.text: Approve building plans that meet required specifications.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Review and interpret plans, blueprints, site layouts, specifications, or construction methods to ensure compliance to legal requirements and safety regulations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Issue permits for construction, relocation, demolition, or occupancy.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Inspect bridges, dams, highways, buildings, wiring, plumbing, electrical circuits, sewers, heating systems, or foundations during and after construction for structural quality, general safety, or conformance to specifications and codes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Monitor installation of plumbing, wiring, equipment, or appliances to ensure that installation is performed properly and is in compliance with applicable regulations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Inspect and monitor construction sites to ensure adherence to safety standards, building codes, or specifications.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Confer with owners, violators, or authorities to explain regulations or recommend remedial actions.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Measure dimensions and verify level, alignment, or elevation of structures or fixtures to ensure compliance to building plans and codes.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Maintain daily logs and supplement inspection records with photographs.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Conduct inspections, using survey instruments, metering devices, tape measures, or test equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Train, direct, or supervise other construction inspectors.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Monitor construction activities to ensure that environmental regulations are not violated.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Evaluate project details to ensure adherence to environmental regulations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Inspect facilities or installations to determine their environmental impact.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Examine lifting or conveying devices, such as elevators, escalators, moving sidewalks, hoists, inclined railways, ski lifts, or amusement rides to ensure safety and proper functioning.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Conduct environmental hazard inspections to identify or quantify problems, such as asbestos, poor air quality, water contamination, or other environmental hazards.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Estimate cost of completed work or of needed renovations or upgrades.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Evaluate premises for cleanliness, such as proper garbage disposal or lack of vermin infestation.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Sample and test air to identify gasses, such as bromine, ozone, or sulfur dioxide, or particulates, such as mold, dust, or allergens.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
